overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Watch Dogs: Legion) showing a character in a distinctive metallic coat walking through a rainy London street at night. The character navigates wet sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes pedestrians with umbrellas while neon signs and modern buildings illuminate the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with neon signage and iron fencing

events.description: character briefly turns head to observe surroundings while continuing to walk forward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk toward the illuminated SEVERE sign, passing by brick buildings and iron fences

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction, gradually moving further away

entered.detail: large illuminated red neon sign displaying 'SEVERE' mounted on a pole above the street
multi-story building with illuminated windows and modern facade
black metal fence running along the right side of the sidewalk with trees behind it
tall street light illuminating the wet pavement with warm orange glow

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet city sidewalk at night, approaching a prominent red neon 'SEVERE' warning sign. The street is lined with modern office buildings on the left and an iron fence with trees on the right. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead in the distance as street lamps cast reflections on the rain-slicked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the street into the intersection
traffic light changes from red to green as character approaches the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt road at an intersection, navigating around vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: white hatchback car driving through the intersection, passing from right to left
pedestrian holding a large checkered umbrella waiting at the crosswalk corner

entered.detail: white hatchback vehicle moving through the intersection
blue and white parking sign with letter P visible on the left side of the street
traffic signal showing red then changing to green

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the sidewalk into a wide urban intersection, crossing the wet asphalt as a white car passes by. The traffic light changes from red to green while pedestrians with umbrellas wait at the corners. The SEVERE sign and iron fence recede into the background as the character moves toward the opposite side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with parked vehicles and mixed architecture

events.description: character navigates around a pedestrian with a glowing blue backpack on the left side of the path
character passes close to a pedestrian with an umbrella, temporarily obscuring the view of the street ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk passing parked cars and navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a jacket with glowing blue holographic elements on the back, walking in the opposite direction
pedestrian holding a black umbrella walking toward the camera, passing closely by

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles including a white hatchback and dark sedans along the curb
multi-story residential building with brick facade and illuminated entrance
illuminated digital poster display on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sidewalk lined with parked cars and brick apartment buildings, encountering various pedestrians including one with distinctive glowing blue backpack elements. The character navigates around people with umbrellas while passing illuminated advertising posters and street lamps. The traffic light remains visible but shifts position as the character progresses down the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban canyon with tall modern towers and digital advertising

events.description: character passes a digital poster displaying 'KEEPING YOU SAFE' message with authoritarian imagery
character looks upward toward the top of a tall modern skyscraper while continuing to walk

agents.ego_description: walking through a denser urban area, observing the tall buildings and digital signage, occasionally looking up at the architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella standing near the building entrance, looking at the character

entered.detail: illuminated digital billboard displaying propaganda-style message 'KEEPING YOU SAFE' with imagery
very tall modern skyscraper with distinctive geometric facade rising above the street
black sedan parked along the curb with distinctive grille design
black public waste bin on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrower urban canyon with towering modern buildings overhead, passing a prominent digital poster with the message 'KEEPING YOU SAFE.' The street features parked luxury cars, trash bins, and scattered pedestrians with umbrellas. The character occasionally looks up at the impressive height of the central skyscraper while navigating the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked London street that transitions from an open office district into a dense urban canyon of towering skyscrapers. It begins with the character walking along a wet sidewalk past an iron fence and a prominent red neon SEVERE sign, where street lamps cast reflections on the pavement. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a wide urban intersection, crossing the wet asphalt past a passing white car while the previous landmarks recede into the background. The camera then follows the character onto a sidewalk lined with brick apartment buildings and parked cars, navigating around pedestrians with umbrellas and a person with a glowing blue backpack. Finally, the environment shifts into a narrower corridor of modern architecture, passing a digital KEEPING YOU SAFE poster and luxury cars before tilting upward toward the imposing height of a central skyscraper.
